channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Outdoor hockey is coming to Florida. The NHL will have games in Miami and Tampa next season
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Hockey. Outdoors. In Florida. Next season, the NHL is making it happen — twice. The NHL announced Wednesday that the Stanley Cup champion Florida Panthers will play host to the New York Rangers at loanDepot Park in Miami — home of baseball’s Marlins — on Jan.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NHL postpones Kings-Flames game over devastating California wildfires
item.description: The NHL on Wednesday postponed a game between the Los Angeles Kings and Calgary Flames as wildfires burn near the Crypto.com Arena in Southern California.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Squabble grows as US government holds back 2024 funding from world anti-doping watchdog WADA
item.description: The U.S. government did not pay the more than $3.6 million due to the World Anti-Doping Agency in 2024, making good on a long-running threat anchored in unhappiness with the global watchdog’s handling of cases involving Chinese swimmers and others.
item.dc:creator: Eddie Pells, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Penn State coach James Franklin calls for college football to have uniformity
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — The Big Ten plays nine conference games in football. So does the Big 12. The Southeastern Conference and the Atlantic Coast Conference are among those playing eight-game league schedules. The Mountain West played a seven-game league slate. Notre Dame doesn't have a league.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: A plot twist from what college football has become: A player who stayed
item.description: DANIA BEACH, Fla. (AP) — When Penn State moved a different linebacker into what had been Tyler Elsdon's starting spot, Elsdon made a choice that doesn't really fit into the storyline college football has been selling these days. He stayed right where he was.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: NBA coaches Steve Kerr and JJ Redick say family members evacuated their homes amid Pacific Palisades wildfires
item.description: By George Ramsay and Kevin Dotson | CNN Golden State Warriors head coach Steve Kerr acknowledged the “terrifying” impact of the wildfires in California, while also revealing that his mother was forced to evacuate her home in Pacific Palisades.
item.dc:creator: CNN.com Wire Service, The Mercury News

item.title: Former Baltimore Orioles left-hander Brian Matusz dies at 37, no cause of death announced
item.description: BALTIMORE (AP) — Brian Matusz, the left-handed pitcher who spent eight seasons in the major leagues, mostly with the Baltimore Orioles as they returned to prominence a decade ago, has died. He was 37.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Masters gives another invitation to Niemann. Hojgaard invitation means Augusta gets twins
item.description: Joaquin Niemann of LIV Golf is returning to the Masters, the second straight time Augusta National has given the Chilean a special invitation.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: St. Patrick names former Notre Dame star Tom Zbikowski head football coach
item.description: CHICAGO — One of the best safeties in Notre Dame's storied football program was named head coach of Saint Patrick High School. Tom Zbikowski, 39, will take over the Northwest Side high school's football program.
item.dc:creator: Andy Koval, WGN 9

item.title: Belgian Grand Prix gets contract extension but set to be dropped from F1 schedule in 2028 and 2030
item.description: Formula 1 has extended its contract with the Belgian Grand Prix, but one of the sport's most established races is set to be dropped from the schedule in 2028 and 2030. The extension starting from next year includes races only in 2026, 2027, 2029 and 2031, F1 said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ELLINGWORTH, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Stephen Curry, Warriors struggle again in 2nd straight embarrassing home loss
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Coach Steve Kerr criticized his Golden State Warriors for being down and lacking “a competitive spirit" in their latest embarrassing loss.
item.dc:creator: JANIE McCAULEY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: West Virginia's Javon Small leads the Big 12 in scoring to fuel West Virginia's return to the Top 25
item.description: Javon Small was the best player on mediocre teams during his first three college seasons. Now he’s the Big 12’s leading scorer and a major reason why short-handed West Virginia is relevant again. No.
item.dc:creator: JOHN RABY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ready for takeoff: Duke star Cooper Flagg puts highlight-dunk signature on Pittsburgh win
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Cooper Flagg was still simmering, angry at himself, for picking up his third foul so early in the second half before knocking away an entry pass to force a turnover.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utes drop fourth straight to #3 Iowa State, 82-59
item.description: AMES, Iowa (ABC4 Sports) - The Utes gave #3 Iowa State a game, but the Cyclones overpowered the Utes down the stretch for an 82-59 victory, handing the Utes their fourth straight defeat. Curtis Jones had 23 points off the bench to lead Iowa State to its 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: LIV Golf fills out its 2025 schedule with final 3 events going head-to-head with PGA Tour
item.description: LIV Golf will play its final three events in the United States the same week as the FedEx Cup playoffs on the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Giants agree to deal with Justin Verlander: reports
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The San Francisco Giants are adding former MVP Justin Verlander to their pitching staff, multiple outlets reported Tuesday. The team reportedly agreed to a one-year deal with the pitcher. Verlander, 41, is one of the best pitchers of the 2000s and a future Hall of Famer.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Kessler celebrating girlfriend's Miss America title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Walker Kessler has played basketball in front of thousands of fans for the Utah Jazz. But he couldn't have been more stressed Sunday night when his girlfriend, Miss Alabama Abbie Stockard, was a finalist for Miss America.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Wave names Jonas Eidevall as new head coach
item.description: San Diego Wave FC has named Jonas Eidevall as its new head coach. Eidevall, a native of Sweden, has more than a decade of experience as a head coach and has led Arsenal Women to three consecutive top-three finishes in the Women's Super League.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: 49ers stars reflect on how season badly derailed
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (KRON) -- As the San Francisco 49ers packed up their lockers at Levi's Stadium on Monday, players told reporters about how they will move forward into next season. Tight end George Kittle summed up the season as "disappointing.
item.dc:creator: Amy Larson, KRON4

item.title: Rays 'expect' city to repair Tropicana Field by Opening Day 2026
item.description: Tampa Bay Rays leaders now say they "support and expect" the City of St. Petersburg to repair hurricane-damaged Tropicana Field by Opening Day of the 2026 season.
item.dc:creator: Rachel Tucker, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Lawsuit alleges ex-Fox Sports host Skip Bayless harassed hairstylist, offered her $1.5 million for sex
item.description: The complaint claims Fox executives fostered a hostile work environment that allowed senior managers and on-air personalities including Bayless to abuse workers without fear of punishment.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Patriots fire coach Jerod Mayo shortly after beating Bills to finish his lone season at 4-13
item.description: FOXBOROUGH, Mass. (AP) — The New England Patriots fired coach Jerod Mayo on Sunday after one season, beginning another reboot for the franchise just a year after it parted with longtime coach Bill Belichick.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: New Orleans Saints, NFL to donate $1 million to victims of truck attack
item.description: The relief contributions come after Shamsud-Din Jabbar drove a rented truck into a crowd on New Year’s Day on Bourbon Street, killing 14 people.
item.dc:creator: Sarah Fortinsky, NewsNation

item.title: Joe Burrow and the Cincinnati Bengals keep their playoff hopes alive by edging the Steelers 19-17
item.description: Joe Burrow passed for 277 yards and a touchdown, Cade York kicked four field goals and the Cincinnati Bengals kept their slim playoff hopes alive with a 19-17 win over the floundering Pittsburgh Steelers on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: WILL GRAVES, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James breaks Michael Jordan's record for 30-point games with his 563rd
item.description: LeBron James broke Michael Jordan's NBA record for 30-point games during the Los Angeles Lakers' victory over Atlanta on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks begins 50th season with big dreams
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - After finishing third in the NCAA Nationals last season, the Utah gymnastics team has reloaded and is ready to make a run at its first national title in 30 years. The Red Rocks begin its 50th season Friday at home against Utah State loaded with talent.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rams QB Matthew Stafford gets home inspected amid string of NFL home burglaries
item.description: A string of high-profile burglaries at the homes of NFL players that has even prompted a warning from the FBI has led one of the brightest stars of Los Angeles to take a proactive approach to the issue.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: No. 6 Ohio State routs top-ranked Oregon 41-21 in the Rose Bowl, advances to CFP semifinals
item.description: PASADENA, Calif. (AP) — Second chances don’t come around often in life, Ohio State coach Ryan Day told his players in a team meeting before the Rose Bowl.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5
